title: MCP client configuration
description: Unofficial JSON Schema for MCP (Model Context Protocol) client config files: mcp.json, claude_desktop_config.json, cline_mcp_settings.json, .cursor/mcp.json, .codeium/windsurf/mcp_config.json. Maintained by mcpcheck — https://github.com/MukundaKatta/mcpcheck

mcpServers.description: Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Cursor / Cline / Windsurf server map. Keys are server names; values describe how the client should reach each server.

servers.description: Alternate server map key used by some VS Code-style configs.

context_servers.description: Zed's key for MCP servers inside settings.json.

Server.description: Single MCP server entry. Must have either `command` (stdio transport) or `url` (http/sse/streamable-http).

command.description: Absolute path or PATH-resolvable binary launched as a child process (stdio transport).

env.description: Environment variables passed to the child. Values must be strings. Use ${VAR} to substitute from the parent shell.

url.description: HTTP/SSE endpoint for remote MCP servers.

transport.description: Explicit transport. Usually inferred from `command` (stdio) or `url` (sse/streamable-http).

cwd.description: Working directory for the spawned process.

headers.description: HTTP headers to include on requests to a URL-based server.

disabled.description: If true, the client skips this server.

autoApprove.description: Tool names that should not require user confirmation.

alwaysAllow.description: Tool names that should always be allowed (Cline).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this server.

icon.description: Optional icon (data URI, path, or emoji) for clients that render one.

name.description: Optional display name override; defaults to the map key.
